reason: Both findings are minor cosmetic/completeness issues with no meaningful impact on an agent's ability to answer questions about PerformanceLog. The core API usage, configuration properties, and output format are fully present and accurate.

findings_assessment.justification: The omitted comment '// 以下ではログ出力のオプション情報は指定していない。' is redundant in context. The preceding comment '// endメソッドでは、ポイント、処理結果を表す文字列、ログ出力のオプション情報を指定できる。' already communicates that the optional 3rd parameter exists. A reader seeing a 2-argument call after that comment can trivially infer the optional arg is not used. No agent reasoning about the API would be misled or blocked. Why it persisted: Phase E output is identical to Phase D — the fix agent produced no change, likely treating the existing comment as sufficient coverage.

The short names 'FileLogWriter' and 'BasicLogFormatter' are already present as hints in s4. The full qualified names 'nablarch.core.log.basic.FileLogWriter' and 'nablarch.core.log.basic.BasicLogFormatter' are infrastructure classes that are the primary subject of other knowledge files (basic log configuration), not this one. A user querying by those FQCNs would be better served by those dedicated files. Omitting them from s4 hints does not cause retrieval failure for performance log questions. Why it persisted: Phase E output is identical to Phase D — the fix agent made no changes, consistent with treating the existing short-name hints as adequate for s4's role as an output example section.
